rules: Overlines/Labels must be uppercase with wide tracking (tracking-[0.2em]).

navbar.rules: Must include Reserve Table CTA. Links visible on desktop, hamburger on mobile.

hero.layout: min-h-[90vh] flex items-center justify-center relative overflow-hidden
hero.animation: Subtle slow zoom on background image (scale 1.05 to 1 over 10s).

buttons.primary: bg-[#C62828] text-white hover:bg-[#A02020] transition-colors rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-medium tracking-wide
buttons.secondary: border border-[#C62828] text-[#C62828] dark:text-white dark:border-white hover:bg-[#C62828] hover:text-white transition-colors rounded-none px-8 py-4
buttons.floating: fixed bottom-6 right-6 z-50 rounded-full shadow-2xl

cards.style: bg-surface rounded-xl border border-border overflow-hidden transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-2 hover:shadow-2xl

menu_tabs.inactive: bg-transparent border border-border px-6 py-2 rounded-full hover:border-[#C62828] transition-colors

reservation_form.inputs: w-full bg-transparent border-b border-border py-3 focus:outline-none focus:border-[#C62828] transition-colors

sections.feature_highlights: 3-column grid (bento style). Icons + short text. Crystal cards.
sections.about: 2-column layout. Left: narrative text + animated counters (Framer Motion useInView). Right: overlapping elegant images.
sections.popular_menu: Tabbed interface. Dish cards with high-res image, name, description, price, and heart/favorite icon. 2-column or 3-column grid.
sections.chef_section: Editorial layout. Large circular or arched image of chef, bold typographic name, signature, experience, and short story.
sections.special_offers: Full-width banner with parallax background, dark overlay, massive typography (20% OFF).
sections.masonry_gallery: Pinterest-style asymmetrical grid. Columns: 1 on mobile, 2 on tablet, 3-4 on desktop. Use Framer Motion for staggered entrance.
sections.Reviews: Auto-sliding carousel (use Framer Motion or pure CSS/Swiper). Large quote marks, elegant serif font for quotes.
sections.why_choose_us: Grid of 6 cards. Minimalist icons (lucide-react), generous padding.
sections.contact: 2-column layout. Left: Google Maps iframe (grayscale/dark styled if possible). Right: Contact details, opening hours.
sections.footer: Large padding (py-24). Top: Newsletter input (border-bottom style). Bottom: Links, social icons, copyright.

animations.scroll_reveal: Framer Motion initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 30 }} whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} viewport={{ once: true }} transition={{ duration: 0.6 }}
animations.hover_effects: Image scale up slightly on hover within hidden overflow container.

technical_rules: Use Tailwind CSS for all styling. No external CSS files except standard index.css.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for marketing layouts. Use Shadcn ONLY for complex interactive elements (Tabs, Dialog, Toast).
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute.
Ensure Contrast meets APCA standards. DO NOT use complete transparent backgrounds behind text.
Images must not exceed 80vh on mobile.

hero.description: High-end contemporary Indian dish for full-screen hero.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement a Custom Dark Mode toggle using a React Context or a hook that applies the 'dark' class to the HTML tag.
Use Playfair Display for all Headings (H1 to H4). Configure it in tailwind.config.js.
Ensure all sections have proper data-testid (e.g., data-testid='hero-section').
For the Masonry Gallery, use CSS columns (columns-1 md:columns-2 lg:columns-3) or an asymmetrical flex grid. Add lightbox if possible, or just a hover zoom effect.
Use the provided colors exactly as specified. Add them to tailwind.config.js.
